steps.title: Undo the addition
steps.content: Start with $$3p+180=255$$ Subtract $180$ from both sides: $$3p=75$$

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice B — $25$ is $25$. It checks because $3(25)+180=75+180=255$. The other choices would make $3p$ either too small or too large to reach $255$ after adding $180$.
